Shopify Shipping Rate Calculator

Enter your package details to estimate shipping costs. Results are estimates — final rates depend on your Shopify plan and carrier account.

Estimated Rates

* Estimates based on 2024 published rates. Actual rates vary by package dimensions, surcharges, and your carrier account discounts. Enable carrier-calculated rates in Shopify Settings → Shipping and delivery for real-time quotes at checkout.

How to Use This Calculator

Enter the weight of your package in ounces (convert pounds: 1 lb = 16 oz), your warehouse ZIP code, and your customer's ZIP code. The calculator returns estimated rates for the most common USPS and UPS services used by Shopify sellers.

Getting Real-Time Rates at Checkout

This tool gives estimates. For exact rates shown to customers at checkout, enable carrier-calculated shipping in your Shopify admin under Settings → Shipping and delivery. Available on the Shopify plan or higher.
